title: Variety Show “Happy Together” Announces Return With Yu Jae Seok, Jang Hang Jun, And Yoon Jong Shin
content:

title_zh: KBS2《Happy Together》重启，刘在石、张恒俊、尹钟信加盟
facts_list: KBS2于6月23日公开三张新海报，展示主持人之间的化学反应
节目更名为《Happy Together: Glad We're Not Alone》（暂译）
主持人阵容包括刘在石、张恒俊、尹钟信

summary_zh: KBS2人气综艺《Happy Together》宣布重启，更名为《Happy Together: Glad We're Not Alone》（暂译），由刘在石、张恒俊、尹钟信担任主持人。KBS于6月23日公开三张新海报，展示主持人之间的化学反应，并正式宣布了重启的播出日期。节目将以全新形式呈现。

title: JTBC Responds To Reports About Variety Shows Amid Corporate Rehabilitation Process
content:
JTBC has denied reports of halting filming for variety shows amid corporate rehabilitation proceedings. Previously on June 12, JTBC declared a default after failing to repay 20.6 billion won (approximately $15 million) in securitized loans by their maturity date. It was later revealed that JoongAng Holdings, Contentree JoongAng, Megabox JoongAng, and JoongAng P&I filed for… Continue reading JTBC Responds To Reports About Variety Shows Amid Corporate Rehabilitation Process
The post JTBC Responds To Reports About Variety Shows Amid Corporate Rehabilitation Process appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: JTBC否认企业重整期间停拍综艺传闻
facts_list: JTBC否认因企业重整程序而停拍综艺节目的报道
6月12日，JTBC因未能偿还206亿韩元（约1500万美元）证券化贷款而宣布违约
JoongAng Holdings、Contentree JoongAng、Megabox JoongAng及JoongAng P&I已申请企业重整
summary_zh: JTBC否认了关于企业重整期间停拍综艺节目的报道。此前6月12日，JTBC因未能偿还206亿韩元（约1500万美元）证券化贷款而宣布违约。随后，JoongAng Holdings、Contentree JoongAng、Megabox JoongAng及JoongAng P&I申请了企业重整。

title_zh: BOYNEXTDOOR新曲《HOME》获福布斯报道：无与伦比的归属感
